## __`OVERVIEW`__
Thank you for playing KAIJU NO. 8 THE GAME.
To protect your game data, we ask that you link your account.

## __`ACCOUNT LINKING`__

By linking your account, you can easily restore and transfer your game data even if you accidentally delete the app.
Additionally, if your current device malfunctions or if you wish to change devices, you can transfer your player data to the new device.

## __`HOW TO LINK YOUR ACCOUNT`__
You can link your account to your Apple Account or Google Account.
Steps to Link Account:

1. Select the global menu from the top right of the Home screen.
2. From the Menu (≡) on the top left of the screen, select Account Linking.
*Account Linking is not possible via "Data Transfer" on the title screen.
3. On the Confirm Link screen, you can choose to "Sign in with Apple" or "Sign in with Google."
4. Sign in with your selected account.

https://asset.kj8-thegame.com/info/production/content/1000030/24c168d8edfd5660c027eb7977e576f9.png?Expires=1780359344&Signature=M0scTRaiKbJD9WoDzFF2fsRcD6DqPCYyo5ZlgTJBteaDd4UkxzGCWpdAG3OdsH6SLIJpVRJj3SG2miorHw6PZzqbALR4pNsUITIQcPPrwLlu6wQWZKJEz~sTNEKfmVqx6Hnhc-zJNAn1cTEdqnNhdqOWCQChBIYbaiuw78JsaikkoVhslwp7aqROTlDnzeDMsy1Ksfn-BLygKeqU4igLJTC3FZAot024gza8Q-x804HrVp9cpRHTqXaWOY9fCZPc9G3BW919oR4krJ~uZuHLZOCvTW6rTKj8Z-ghvt0F3tNsHs8QMY1iq0zjQ4W14lr~C42qXJLq2FoxVPd68hmTdQ__&Key-Pair-Id=K22LOBLWI3HWJQ

After signing in, the message "Account linking complete" will appear upon successful linking.
*Please keep your linked account information secure and avoid sharing it with others.
*After account linking is complete, a confirmation email will be automatically sent to the email address associated with the linked account.

## __`FAQ: REGARDING ACCOUNT LINKING`__
Q1: How do I restore my data or transfer my account?A1: Access Title Menu (≡) on the title screen, select Data Transfer and follow the on-screen instructions.

Q2: After transferring account, will I be able to pick up my game progress from when I linked my account?A2: You can proceed with the game from when you were last online. For example, if you link your account when a mission is ongoing and transfer your account after clearing the mission, the game will proceed from the time when the mission is cleared.

Q3: After transferring my account to a different device, can I still play on the original device?A3: Yes, you can play on both devices. However, you cannot log in to the same account on both devices simultaneously. If a new login is detected on a device, you will be returned to the title screen on the previous device.

Q4: Will my linked account be unlinked if I delete my player data?A4: No, deleting your player data will not unlink your account. To unlink an account, go to Menu (≡) > Account Linking.

Q5: I wish to change my linked account.A5: To do so, first unlink your current account via Menu (≡) > Account Linking. You will then be able to link a new account.

## __`OVERVIEW`__
The Defense Force Pass is now available! Earn rewards such as enhancement materials by raising your Pass Level!

After purchasing the Premium Pass or Deluxe Pass, once you reach Pass Lv. 30, you\'ll receive a Weapon Supply Box III that can be exchanged for a select ★5 weapon.

## __`DETAILS`__
### __`THE DEFENSE FORCE PASS`__
- During the period, you can raise your Pass Level by completing missions and accumulating points.

- At each Pass Level, you can claim rewards such as Gacha Tickets and enhancement materials.
- The Defense Force Pass changes periodically, and when a new one begins, the missions and your Pass Level will be reset.

### __`POINTS`__
- There is a limit to the points that can be earned each week.
- Aside from clearing missions, you can also earn points by spending Dimensional Crystals. These points do not count toward the weekly limit.

For more details, please check the Defense Force Pass > the "i" button.

### __`DEFENSE FORCE PASS TYPES`__
There are three types of Defense Force Passes.

`━ ROW 1 OF 3:`
> `❚ 1:` Free Pass
> `❚ 2:` This pass is unlocked by default.
`━ ROW 2 OF 3:`
> `❚ 1:` Premium Pass
> `❚ 2:` Purchasing this pass instantly grants you Dimensional Crystal x680. The number of items you can obtain when your Pass Level goes up will also increase.

`━ ROW 3 OF 3:`
> `❚ 1:` Deluxe Pass
> `❚ 2:` This is an upgrade to the Premium Pass.
> `❚ └─` Purchasing this pass instantly grants you Dimensional Crystal x1,080, Weapon Supply Box III x1, Kaiju Core Material x1, and Stamina Jelly x5. It also instantly boosts your Pass Level by 10.
*The Premium Pass and Deluxe Pass are only valid for the ongoing Defense Force Pass at the time of purchase.

*The Deluxe Pass is a set that includes the Premium Pass, along with the Dimensional Crystal x1,080, Weapon Supply Box III, etc. that can be received instantly upon purchase. If you purchase the Deluxe Pass first, it counts as also having purchased the Premium Pass. If you purchase the Premium Pass first, you can then purchase the Deluxe Pass at a reduced price. In this case, please note that the number of Dimensional Crystals you instantly receive upon purchasing the Deluxe Pass will be the difference of 400.
*The select ★5 weapon can only be obtained from the Weapon Supply Box III obtained through the Defense Force Pass.

*You will also be able to get the Weapon Supply Box III from the next Defense Force Pass.
*Even if you have reached the weekly point limit, purchasing the Deluxe Pass will still instantly increase your Pass Level.

## __`IMPORTANT`__
- Due to the nature of the product, returns and exchanges are not accepted.
- The availability period and content are subject to change without prior notice. We appreciate your understanding.

- Premium Pass and Deluxe Pass purchases close 1 hour before Defense Force Pass ends.
- Unclaimed rewards when the period ends will be delivered to Mail (Home screen > Mail). Please also note that unclaimed rewards will be removed when they expire.
- Defense Force Pass rewards can be claimed on a different device that is linked to the same account.
- If player data has been deleted, Defense Force Pass rewards cannot be claimed even if a new account has been created on the same device.

1002345.article_name: RAID BATTLE: KAIJU NO. 10 (GIANT FORM) HP ADJUSTMENT
article_item:
## __`REGARDING THE HP ADJUSTMENT`__
To reduce the gameplay burden on our players due to the extended duration of the ongoing Raid Battle, we will be adjusting the Boss\'s remaining HP. We sincerely apologize for any inconvenience.

After this announcement is posted, Dimensional Crystal x150 will be distributed to all players as compensation.
The details of this adjustment are as follows.

## __`ADJUSTMENT DETAILS`__
・The Boss\'s remaining HP will be reduced to 20%.
・Co-Op Damage Mission rewards that become available as a result of this adjustment can be claimed normally.

## __`IMPLEMENTATION SCHEDULE`__

・Around <t:1780023600>

To ensure adequate challenge time and provide clearer event timelines, the following change is planned for future Raid Battles:
・Once the Kaiju\'s HP drops below a certain threshold, a period will be introduced during which its HP will temporarily stop decreasing.
*Damage dealt during this period will still count toward your Ranking and mission progress.
Thank you for your continued support of KAIJU NO. 8 THE GAME.

## __`OVERVIEW`__
Following the defeat of Kaiju No. 10 (Giant Form), a massive swarm of Kaiju has appeared.
Commencing the Mop-Up Operation.
Earn awesome rewards by defeating the Yoju as they put up a desperate final resistance!

### __`AVAILABILITY PERIOD`__

Until <t:1780973999>.

*If all Kaiju are defeated during the availability period, the Mop-Up Operation will end 24 hours after the stages have concluded.

## __`CHANGES SINCE PREVIOUS ROTATION`__
- Increased the amount of obtainable rewards for each stage.

- The limit for replenishing Mop-Up Operation Permits using Dimensional Crystals has changed from no limit to 5 times per day.
- Battles will now end automatically once you have reached the maximum obtainable rewards for each battle based on the number of Kaiju defeated.

## __`EVENT DESCRIPTION`__
- The Mop-Up Operation is a competitive event where all players work to neutralize a massive number of Kaiju.
- The Mop-Up Operation consists of 5 stages, and you can challenge each stage until the remaining number of Kaiju reaches 0.

- Use specific permits to take part in Mop-Up Operation.¹ ²
- Each battle ends once 5 rounds have elapsed. Defeat as many Kaiju as possible within 5 rounds.
- Each of the 5 stages offers different rewards.
- The more Kaiju you defeat in a single battle, the greater the rewards you obtain.
- In every stage, there is a rare chance to obtain ★5 Unimaterial [Ant-Type Kaiju α], which guarantees a ★5 Unipart when used during development.
- Skipping is not available for Mop-Up Operation.

- The event ends once the remaining number of Kaiju in all stages reaches 0.

¹ During the availability period of the Mop-Up Operation, up to 5 Mop-Up Operation Permits can be claimed on the event screen every 4:00 AM JST. If you have unused Mop-Up Operation Permits at 4:00 AM JST, you can claim new ones to reach a total of 5.
² Mop-Up Operation Permits can also be replenished up to 5 times per day using Dimensional Crystal x20. The replenish count resets daily at 4:00 AM JST.

## __`IMPORTANT`__

- If a Mop-Up Operation battle ends in defeat, retreat, or suspension, rewards will still be granted based on the number of Kaiju defeated up until that point. However, Mop-Up Operation Permits will not be refunded.

article_item:
## __`UPDATE: COMMENCING MOP-UP OPERATION`__
[Updated <t:1780130400>]
The Boss Kaiju has been defeated thanks to everyone\'s hard work!
Please note that the reward claim deadline for the Raid Battle Missions is <t:1780973999>.

Following the defeat of Kaiju No. 10 (Giant Form), a massive swarm of Kaiju has appeared.
Commencing the Mop-Up Operation.
Earn awesome rewards by defeating the Yoju as they put up a desperate final resistance!

For more details, please check the relevant announcement.
[・Mop-Up Operation Now Available!](https://info.kj8-thegame.com/news/news/1002340?language=en)

## __`OVERVIEW`__
Raid Battle: Kaiju No. 10 (Giant Form) has come online as of <t:1779505200>.
Raid Battle is an event in which all players will work together to take down a Boss Kaiju.
Challenge the Boss Kaiju to progress along the Raid Battle Missions and earn rewards!

In addition, participate in the rankings to earn titles and rewards.
Deal as much damage as possible!

## __`ELIGIBILITY`__
Reach Player Rank 4 or higher.

## __`CHANGES SINCE PREVIOUS ROTATION`__
- Based on previous Raid Battle statistics, we have increased the Boss Kaiju\'s HP.
- Adjusted buff content.

Furthermore, we plan to implement the following adjustment in future Raid Battles to ensure a sufficient challenge period for players.
- When the Kaiju\'s HP falls below a certain threshold, it cannot be further reduced for a period of time.

*Damage dealt during this period will still be reflected in the rankings and missions.

## __`EVENT DESCRIPTION`__
- Raid Battle is an event in which all players will work together to take down a Boss Kaiju.
- Use specific permits or Stamina to take part in Raid Battles.¹
- Raid Battles end once 5 rounds have elapsed. Deal as much damage as possible to the Boss Kaiju within 5 rounds.

- After challenging a Raid Battle once, players will be able to select the skip option.²
- Challenge Raid Battles to advance Raid Battle Mission progress and earn rewards.

¹ During the availability period of the Raid Battle, up to 3 Raid Battle Permits can be claimed on the event screen every 4:00 AM JST. If you have unused Raid Battle Permits at 4:00 AM JST, you can claim new ones to reach a total of 3.
² When skipping, damage from the previous unskipped challenge will be used for damage calculation.

## __`MISSIONS`__
- There are 3 types of missions in Raid Battles.
- Complete these missions to earn points and claim corresponding rewards based on points obtained.

▽ Co-Op Damage Missions
- During the event period, all players will work together to challenge these co-op missions.

▽ Daily Missions
- During the event period, these missions will update every day until the Boss Kaiju is defeated.
- Daily Missions are updated daily at 4:00 AM JST during the event period.

▽ Limited-Time Missions

- During the event period, these missions can only be completed once. They remain available until the Boss Kaiju is defeated.

- For more details about each mission, please head to Raid Battle > Raid Battle Missions.

## __`SUPPORT EFFECTS`__
- Specific Support Effects can be received during Raid Battles.

- After each Raid Battle challenge, you can select and enhance 1 out of 3 Support Effects.
- The levels of Support Effects will accumulate and be shared by all players.
- Enhance Support Effects to deal even more damage to the Boss Kaiju.

## __`RANKING`__
- Raid Battles feature rankings for the highest damage dealt to the Boss Kaiju in a single battle.

- You can check your score and rank from Raid Battle > Ranking.¹
- Obtain rewards after the event ends based on your rank when the Boss Kaiju is neutralized.
- Ranking rewards will be distributed via Mail after the tallying period following the event\'s conclusion.²
- For details on rewards, please refer to Raid Battle > Ranking > Rewards.

¹ The Top 100 info on the Ranking screen is updated every five minutes. Depending on the timing of the update, your score may differ from the score displayed in the rankings.

² The mail (including any attached items) will be deleted 90 days after you receive it. Please make sure to open the mail and claim the items before the deadline.

## __`IMPORTANT`__
- This event will be available until the Boss Kaiju is defeated.
- After the Boss Kaiju is defeated, Daily Missions and Limited-Time Missions can no longer be achieved.
- After the Boss Kaiju is defeated, the event will end after a certain period. The end time will be updated in News.

- Once the event ends, any remaining Raid Battle Permits will be recalled.
- Once the event ends, Raid Battle Mission rewards will no longer be available (and will not be sent to your Mail). Please remember to claim them within the event period.

article_item:

## __`PICKUP GACHA OVERVIEW`__
### __`PICKUP CONTENT`__
This Pickup Gacha features the following character and weapon!

■ New ★5 Character
[Keystone of Western Japan] Soichiro Hoshina (Optimal weapon type: Assault Rifle)
■ New ★5 Weapon
AR-6710 (Assault Rifle)

*For details on the characters and weapons, please refer to Gacha > Pickup Details.
*The character and weapon listed above are scheduled to appear in future Pickup Gachas after this one ends.

### __`RELATED EVENT & STORY`__
During the gacha availability period, a trial battle for [Keystone of Western Japan] Soichiro Hoshina is available!
Play it by going to Events > Trial Battle.

The story featuring [Keystone of Western Japan] Soichiro Hoshina is available in the Special Event [Whirlwind from the West].

*Even if you are unable to reach the end of the story during the Special Event period, please rest assured that it will be available to view as a Character Story after the event ends.
You can access Character Stories from Home > Story > Characters.
*Character Stories (unlocked at Player Rank 6) can be played at any time after their release.

## __`PICKUP GACHA DETAILS`__
### __`PICKUP GACHA MEDALS`__
For every pull you perform in the "Pickup" gacha type (hereinafter referred to as Pickup Gacha), you will receive 1 Pickup Gacha Medal. The Medals can be exchanged at the Shop for eligible ★5 characters and ★5 weapons.
*You can also earn Pickup Gacha Medals when you use Gacha Tickets to pull.
*Pickup Gacha Medals do not have an expiration date.

*The items available for exchange with Pickup Gacha Medals will be updated periodically. Please refer to the "Exchange Period" at the beginning of this announcement for the dates.

### __`GUARANTEED ★4 OR HIGHER CHARACTER`__
In Pickup Gacha, if you perform 9 pulls that all result in weapons, your next Pickup Gacha pull is guaranteed to be a ★4 or higher character.
For details on available characters, please refer to Gacha > Appearance Rates/History > Appearance Rates > Appearance Rates for Guaranteed ★4 or Higher Character.
*This guarantee applies whether you perform a 10-pull or 10 single pulls.

*This guarantee also applies whether you perform 10 pulls on the same Pickup Gacha or a total of 10 pulls across different Pickup Gachas.
*You can check your past gacha results by going to Gacha > Appearance Rates/History > History.
*Gacha results from the "Standard" or "Special" type gachas do not affect this guarantee setting. You can check the gacha type on the Gacha screen and in Gacha > Appearance Rates/History > History.

### __`OBTAINING DUPLICATE CHARACTERS`__

When you obtain a character you already own, the duplicate copy will automatically be converted into Encounter Stones and/or Talent Shards based on their rarity and how many times you\'ve obtained them. Encounter Stones can be exchanged for various items in the Shop, while Talent Shards can be used to Ascend characters.

> `❚ 2:` Acquisition Count
> `❚ 3:` Items Received

`━ ROW 5 OF 5:`

### __`OBTAINING WEAPONS`__
When you obtain a weapon, you will receive Encounter Stones based on its rarity. Encounter Stones can be exchanged for various items in the Shop.

In addition, you can obtain Refinement Crystals by disassembling ★5 weapons from Gacha. Refinement Crystals can be exchanged for certain ★5 weapons in the Shop. For more details, please go to Gacha > Weapon Exchange.
*To disassemble weapons, open up the global menu on the top right of the Home screen > Storage.
*Weapon Exchange will be limited to 1 time per month, and will reset on the 1st day of every month at 04:00 JST.

article_item:
## __`SPECIAL EVENT NOW AVAILABLE`__
Thank you for playing KAIJU NO. 8 THE GAME.

Special Event [Whirlwind from the West] is now available as of <t:1779246000>.

In this Special Event, you can earn:
・A new Home background, also featured in the story
・Over 1,500 Dimensional Crystals
・Event-limited ★4 weapon "AR-Egret 12" (Assault Rifle)
・Potential Shards II
...as well as other rewards and titles!

Take part in the event from Home > Events > Special Event after clearing Main Story Chapter 0.

*Dimensional Crystals can be obtained from quest clear rewards, mission rewards, and from the Event Gacha.
*The method for exchanging Interlude Notes varies from event to event.

### __`AVAILABILITY PERIOD`__
<t:1779246000> - <t:1781060399>

*Reward claim and the Event Gacha will be available until <t:1781665199>.

## __`EVENT OVERVIEW`__

The Special Event offers the following content: Story, Quests, and Challenges. Clear quests to unlock the rest of the story.

■ Story
The story focuses on specific characters.
You must clear quests to progress through parts of the story.

Even if you are unable to reach the end of the story during the Special Event period, please rest assured that it will be available to view as a Character Story after the event ends.
You can access Character Stories from Home > Story > Characters.

■ Quests
Deploy for quests by consuming Stamina.
By clearing a quest, you can proceed to the next one.

Quests have Combat Objectives. If you clear all Combat Objectives, you will be able to use the skip function on subsequent attempts.

Clear quests to obtain Interlude Notes, which can be used in the Event Gacha to exchange for various items.

■ Challenges
In Challenges, you can take on high-difficulty battles.

Stage effects will be active in Challenges. Be sure to make full use of them to secure yourself an advantage.

■ Missions
You can earn rewards by clearing various missions.
You can also earn Interlude Notes from mission rewards, which can be used in the Event Gacha.

■ Event Gacha
You can perform one pull in the Event Gacha by consuming 10 Interlude Notes to exchange for various items.
By adjusting the Pull Settings, you can exchange Interlude Notes for up to 100 pulls at once.
The Event Gacha contains up to 800 rewards. By meeting certain conditions, you can reset the rewards and earn them again.

For Lineups #1 to #6 of the Event Gacha, you can reset the rewards after obtaining all key rewards.

Resetting the rewards will switch the current lineup to the next one.

The key rewards for each lineup are as follows:
・Lineups #1–2: AR-Egret 12, Potential Shard II x10, and Kaiju Core Material
・Lineup #3: Home background "Keystone of Western Japan"
・Lineups #4–6: AR-Egret 12 and Potential Shard II x10

For Lineup #7 and beyond, you can reset the rewards after obtaining all rewards in the current lineup.
All lineups from #7 onwards will contain the same content.

Once obtained from the Event Gacha, you can use the Home background even after the event period.

*If you do not obtain the Home background from the Event Gacha, it will be available for exchange with Encounter Stones at Home > Shop > Encounter Stone after the event period ends.
If you already own the featured Home background, it will be converted into the same number of Encounter Stones required for the exchange.

*Interlude Notes will be available for use until <t:1781665199> and will be recalled when expired.

### __`TITLES`__

In this Special Event, you can obtain separate titles after meeting the following conditions: "Obtain a total of 27☆ in Special Event Quests" and "Obtain a total of 6☆ in Special Event Challenges."

## __`SPECIAL EVENT RELEASE CELEBRATION LOGIN BONUS`__
Log in during the period to get up to 10 Pickup Gacha Tickets and 1 Stamina Jelly.

<t:1779246000> - <t:1780858799>

Large Conquest: Invigorating Pursuit has come online as of <t:1778727600>.
Large Conquest is a battle event where you fight against continuously appearing Kaiju.
Utilize stage effects, challenge the Kaiju, and clear quests to earn rewards and titles!

The quick clear feature is available for this event.

article_item:
## __`SPECIAL EVENT NOW AVAILABLE`__
Thank you for playing KAIJU NO. 8 THE GAME.

Special Event [In a Gentle Drowse] is now available as of <t:1778382000>.

In this Special Event, you can earn:
・A new Home background, also featured in the story
・Over 1,500 Dimensional Crystals
・Potential Shards II
...as well as other rewards and titles!

Take part in the event from Home > Events > Special Event after clearing Main Story Chapter 0.

*Dimensional Crystals can be obtained from quest clear rewards, mission rewards, and from the event item Exchange Shop.
*The method for exchanging Interlude Notes varies from event to event.

### __`AVAILABILITY PERIOD`__

<t:1778382000> - <t:1780282799>

*Reward claim and event item exchange will be available until <t:1780887599>.

## __`EVENT OVERVIEW`__
The Special Event offers the following content: Story, Quests, and Challenges. Clear quests to unlock the rest of the story.

■ Story
The story focuses on specific characters.
You must clear quests to progress through parts of the story.

Even if you are unable to reach the end of the story during the Special Event period, please rest assured that it will be available to view as a Character Story after the event ends.

You can access Character Stories from Home > Story > Characters.

■ Quests
Deploy for quests by consuming Stamina.
By clearing a quest, you can proceed to the next one.
Quests have Combat Objectives. If you clear all Combat Objectives, you will be able to use the skip function on subsequent attempts.

Clear quests to obtain Interlude Notes, which can be exchanged for items in the Shop.

You can obtain a new Home background by exchanging Interlude Notes in the Shop.
Once obtained, you can use this Home background even after the event period.

*After the event period, the Home background will be available for exchange with Encounter Stones at Home > Shop > Encounter Stone.
If you already own the featured Home background, it will be converted into the same number of Encounter Stones required for the exchange.

■ Challenges
In Challenges, you can take on high-difficulty battles.
Stage effects will be active in Challenges. Be sure to make full use of them to secure yourself an advantage.

■ Missions
You can earn rewards by clearing various missions.
You can also earn the exchange item Interlude Notes from mission rewards, which can be exchanged for various items in the Shop.

In this event, new missions will unlock sequentially starting from <t:1778439600>.

The mission unlock schedule is as follows:
- DAY 2 Missions
<t:1778439600>

<t:1778526000>

<t:1778612400>

<t:1778698800>

*Interlude Notes will be available for use until <t:1780887599> and will be recalled when expired.

article_item:
## __`MAIN STORY CHAPTER 11 RELEASE`__
Thank you for playing KAIJU NO. 8 THE GAME.

Main Story Chapter 11 "Wanderfalke" is now available as of <t:1777604400>.

Head to Home > Story and select Main Story Chapter 11 to experience it.
While you can play the content even if you have not cleared the previous Main Story chapters, we recommend clearing up to Chapter 10 first.

In addition, you can obtain a special Home background upon clearing Main Story Chapter 11.

## __`NEW CHAPTER EVENT`__

To celebrate the release of Main Story Chapter 11, the New Chapter Event is now available.
Take part in the event from Home > Events > New Chapter Event after clearing Main Story Chapter 0.

### __`AVAILABILITY PERIOD`__
<t:1777604400> - <t:1780282799>

### __`EVENT OVERVIEW`__
Progress through Main Story Chapter 11 and challenge the score battles to earn rewards such as Dimensional Crystals.

■ Score Battle
During the event, you can challenge score battles of varying difficulties.
These battles do not consume Stamina and are unlocked by progressing through the new Main Story chapter.

Please check the event screen for the specific unlock conditions for each difficulty.

For the score battles in this event, your performance is evaluated and scored based on the following three criteria:
・Number of rounds elapsed at victory
・Total Blast DMG dealt
・Max DMG in a single attack

Scores are ranked from C, B, A, to S. (No score will be awarded for a defeat.)
Your current highest score can be viewed on the event screen. For reference on further increasing your scores, please check the breakdown for each criterion on the Result screen.

There are two types of rewards related to score battles: first-clear rewards and mission rewards, which are earned by achieving a certain score.

■ Stage Effects

The New Chapter Event features unique stage effects.
Utilize the stage effects and push for the highest score.

■ Missions
You can earn rewards and titles by clearing various missions.

A campaign offering 2x rewards for certain Trainings will begin.

<t:1777575600> - <t:1778698799>

### __`TRAINING: KAIJUMITE—2X REWARDS CAMPAIGN AVAILABILITY PERIOD`__
<t:1778698800> - <t:1779476399>

- During the campaign, receive 2x rewards when completing designated Trainings.

- Rewards can be doubled up to 10 times per day.

■ New Feature: Unlock Potential
The new Unlock Potential feature has been added to further enhance certain characters\' skills and stats.

By using the new item Potential Shard, you can unlock up to 5 stages, earning various enhancement effects at each stage.
Additionally, the new Unlock Potential Material Training has been added as a way to obtain Potential Shard I.

The following updates have been implemented to Kaiju Rush:

■ Recommended Character Display
Scheduled to apply: <t:1777604400>

In events featuring stage effects, recommended characters who can benefit from those effects will be displayed.
*This feature will be applied sequentially to events held after the above date.

■ Update to Battle UI
The following update has been implemented to the battle screen:
・When HP is recovered before or after activating a skill due to status effects or stage effects, a preview of the HP recovery amount will be displayed on the character\'s HP bar.

*If an HP reduction effect occurs simultaneously, the combined prediction will be displayed.

・Resolved Issues

・The "Owned Dimensional Crystals (Paid) Details" may not update from the previous count.

*This is only a display issue. The actual amount owned is updated correctly.

・The total neutralization counts displayed on the Large Conquest event screen may not match the sum of the counts for each individual battle.

・For Special Event Daily Missions, if you meet the clear conditions but have yet to claim the mission rewards when the daily reset occurs, a badge notification remains undismissed even though you are unable to claim the rewards after the reset.

・If you lose a battle when the availability period for Large Conquest has ended and attempt to retry, you may still incorrectly be able to retry the failed battle.

・Unintended behavior may occur during Auto Battle for characters with a companion.

The new Expedition HARD Mode has been added after the Version 1.3.5 maintenance.

Kaiju that appear in HARD Mode are significantly stronger.

Take advantage of loot found only in HARD Mode to achieve greater distances!

### __`AVAILABILITY PERIOD`__
After the maintenance

## __`ELIGIBILITY`__

Reach 1,500 km in Expedition NORMAL Mode.

*The Kaiju that appear in HARD Mode are extremely powerful. We recommend challenging this mode when your attack and HP effect values increased by acquired loot are 2,500% or higher.

## __`EVENT DESCRIPTION`__
- Expedition HARD Mode is unlocked after reaching 1,500 km in NORMAL Mode (the playable Expedition before this update).

- You can select NORMAL or HARD for your next deployment from the Deployment Prep screen.
- The basic gameplay and rules remain the same as Expedition NORMAL Mode.
- Kaiju stats in HARD Mode are significantly increased compared to NORMAL Mode.
- Loot obtained by progressing through HARD Mode is separate from the loot obtainable in NORMAL Mode. You cannot obtain NORMAL Mode loot in HARD Mode.
- The effects of obtained loot are always active in both modes, regardless of which mode they were acquired from.

### __`UPDATES WITH ADDITION OF HARD MODE`__
- Increased the rank limit for units.
- Added new skills obtainable when units reach a certain rank.
- Added NORMAL, HARD, and Misc. to the Acquisition Mode filter in Loot Overview. Loot categorized as Misc. includes loot purchased on the Deployment Prep screen using Command Rewards or Dimensional Crystals.
- Loot acquisition rates for NORMAL and HARD Modes can now be checked on the Loot Overview screen.

## __`IMPORTANT`__
- With this Expedition update, any ongoing Expedition will be treated as a retreat, and you will start again from the Deployment Prep screen. Please note that you will not obtain any loot, Expedition Points, or Command Rewards from that Expedition. Thank you for your understanding.

Thank you for playing KAIJU NO. 8 THE GAME.

1000805.article_name: CHANGES TO WEEKLY LIMIT AND STAMINA FOR IDENTIFIED KAIJU NEUTRALIZATION
article_item:
We are announcing two changes to Training: Identified Kaiju Neutralization starting <t:1765162800>.

(1) Increase to Weekly Limit
The reward claim limit for Identified Kaiju Neutralization is currently 3 times per week. This will be changed to 5 times per week.

(2) Stamina Consumption Removal

The Stamina required for Identified Kaiju Neutralization will be set to 0.

Exploit Medals obtainable through Identified Kaiju Neutralization are rare items necessary to enhance a character\'s skills.
Be sure to acquire them to enhance your characters!

### __`IMPORTANT`__

The weekly reset for the reward claim limit before this update will occur on <t:1765134000>.

From <t:1765134000> to <t:1765162799>, the limit will remain 3 times and the Stamina cost will remain 20.
Players who have already cleared the quest 3 times during the period above will be able to challenge an additional 2 times after the update.
Please note that we are unable to refund Stamina for challenges made during the period above. We appreciate your understanding.
Thank you for your continued support of KAIJU NO. 8 THE GAME.
